objective: Release opencodex v2.7.6: comprehensive dev review, sol-high final gate, CI gate, merge to main/preview, npm publish.

tasks.title: Run full test suite + tsc, verify green
Dispatch gpt-5.6-sol high reviewer on full diff
Merge dev to main, push, verify CI
Merge dev to preview with preview tag, push

criteria.scenario: Full diff review finds no ship-blocking issues
criteria.capturedEvidence: Full diff review (41 files +3745/-207): no ship-blocking issues. Key areas: encrypted marker strip (3 adapters), hy3 exclusion, images relay PR#87, web-search stall timeout + progress-stream + bounded-body, adapter error redaction, catalog dated-variant handling.

criteria.scenario: Full test suite + tsc green on dev
criteria.expectedEvidence: bun test ./tests/ 0 fail; bun x tsc --noEmit exit 0
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test ./tests/ => 2014 pass, 0 fail, 8511 expect, 198 files. bun x tsc --noEmit exit 0.

criteria.expectedEvidence: git rev-parse HEAD == git ls-remote origin dev
criteria.capturedEvidence: git push origin dev succeeded (45bebbe6..853e7fea); git ls-remote confirms 853e7fea on origin/dev.

criteria.scenario: Sol high final review PASS or GO-WITH-FIXES (all folded)
criteria.capturedEvidence: Sol high (gpt-5.6-sol high) verdict: GO-WITH-FIXES(3). Blocker 1 (images retry) FOLDED: replaced fetchWithResetRetry with single fetch. Blocker 2 (images unbounded response) FOLDED: added 100MiB cap. Blocker 3 (web-search unbounded duration) ACCEPTED AS RISK for v2.7.6. Post-fix: 2014/0 tests, tsc clean.

criteria.scenario: package.json version 2.7.6, release commit on dev
criteria.expectedEvidence: git show --stat HEAD shows release commit
criteria.capturedEvidence: git log --oneline -1: 6a6ba06d release: v2.7.6. package.json version 2.7.6. Commit includes images.ts safety fix (single fetch, 100MiB cap).

criteria.expectedEvidence: git log origin/main shows release commit; CI passes
criteria.capturedEvidence: git push origin main: 893f202b..37f97e34. CI (ci.yml) on main passed (conclusion=success). gh run: https://github.com/lidge-jun/opencodex/actions/runs/29092054867

criteria.expectedEvidence: git log origin/preview shows preview release
criteria.capturedEvidence: git push origin preview: a5378eaf..6a6ba06d (fast-forward). Preview branch updated with all v2.7.6 changes.

npm view @bitkyc08/opencodex@2.7.6 => 2.7.6. npm dist-tag ls: latest=2.7.6. GitHub release v2.7.6 exists (isDraft=false, isPrerelease=false). Release workflow: https://github.com/lidge-jun/opencodex/actions/runs/29092202158 (conclusion=success).
